Bundled component: UxPlay
License: GPL-3.0-only

Upstream project:
https://github.com/FDH2/UxPlay

Upstream release archives:
https://github.com/FDH2/UxPlay/releases

Convenience source archive:
https://github.com/FDH2/UxPlay/archive/refs/heads/master.zip

Loupe-specific packaging/build scripts for the bundled binary are part of this
repository, primarily:
- scripts/prepare-vendor-binaries.ps1
- apps/desktop/vendor/uxplay/README.md

This file is included so packaged Loupe distributions that bundle UxPlay also
carry a GPL source link/source-offer notice alongside the binary.

If you redistribute Loupe with bundled UxPlay binaries, preserve this file or
replace it with your own equivalent notice covering the exact corresponding
source for the UxPlay binary you ship.
